e1_sentence: Abu Bakhtari narrated:  A Muslim army led by Sayyidina Salman Farisi (may Allah be pleased with him)  surrounded one of the Persian forts
e2_sentence: The narrator  said: We poured ourselves over them and we conquered that fort
